calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Trust Assets, And To Amend And Reform Provisions Of Trust Instrument.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 293335 Estate of Mary Casserly.

Appearances: Marilyn Young in Propria Persona. Mohammad Walizadeh for Co-Owners of property.

The Court expressed concern about the Trust not being executed by Ms. Casserly, a third Party signing the trust and then revoking his signature and the property never being placed in the Trust. Ms. Young stated that Trust was Ms. Casserly's idea prior to her health issues, that Father Hagan felt there was a conflict with him being a Trustee when he was also a Beneficiary with interest in the real property, that Mr. Ryan resigned as Trustee which left only her, that the property was not transferred into the Trust due to the decline in Ms. Casserly's health and that the focus was on Ms. Casserly's needs. Ms. Young also stated that had a resolution with regard to Mr. Ryan's move out date. The Court denied the Petition to Confirm Trust Assets and granted the Petition for Probate (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Trust Assets, And To Amend And Reform Provisions Of Trust Instrument.
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Continued To Jul-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
